title: BEM-1284 minimal loop
objective: Implement BEM-1284: stop status-only loop and build Minimal Governance Loop Gate 2. Create full valid governance/objects/object_passports.json and governance/release/release_proof_manifest.json. Create governance/state/BEM1284_SSOT_CANONICAL_PATHS.json. Repair governance/runners/*.py so every runner parses, imports, has main(), and deterministic JSON stub logic with release_pass=false. Create governance/runtime/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py that runs deterministic local operator->GD->DIR/CUR->analyst->auditor precheck->worker->auditor postcheck->report->operator loop and writes governance/runtime/BEM1284_MINIMAL_GOVERNANCE_LOOP_RESULT.json with ok=true, release_pass=false, gate_2_minimal_local_e2e=true only when all local steps pass. Create governance/tests/run_bem1284_minimal_governance_loop.py. Create governance/validators/validate_foundation_all.py validating passports, release manifest, runners parse/import, minimal loop exists, and no false receipt/release claim. Create or update .github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml to run validate_foundation_all.py and run_bem1284_minimal_governance_loop.py on push and pull_request only, no schedule. Create governance/reports/BEM1284_MINIMAL_GOVERNANCE_LOOP_GATE2.md in canonical report format with stage task counts, roadmap BEM-931 foundation 14/14, fixes, blockers, no Release PASS. Append BEM-1284 entry to governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md. Acceptance: py_compile all runners and new files; validator passes; minimal loop test passes; result JSON has release_pass=false and gate_2_minimal_local_e2e=true. No issue comments.
